creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)

> In an effort to reduce the impact on performance, I reduced the number. 
> Down from 8, it's now: 
> 
>     dom.ipc.processCount 3

I reduced the number to 1. Still, there arose an excessive number of -isForBrowser processes. 

----

I'm now experimenting with: 

    dom.ipc.processCount 3
    fission.autostart    false

From <https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1596857#c2> (2019-11-15): 

> … Fission, because we will always create new processes for new domains, …
